# Alaska Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Free Alaska bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, Alaska exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

## About
alaskabankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- The 341 Meeting of Creditors in Alaska: https://alaskabankruptcy.org/341-meeting.html
- 341 Meeting of Creditors in Anchorage - What to Expect - Alaska: https://alaskabankruptcy.org/anchorage/341-meeting.html
- Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Anchorage, Alaska - Repayment Plans &amp; Timelines: https://alaskabankruptcy.org/anchorage/chapter-13.html
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy in Anchorage, Alaska - Eligibility, Exemptions &amp; Timeline: https://alaskabankruptcy.org/anchorage/chapter-7.html

- Anchorage Bankruptcy Exemptions - State vs. Federal - Alaska: https://alaskabankruptcy.org/anchorage/exemptions.html
